aas.name: Improved Familiar
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 52 - Refresh Time: 0:01:00 - Ability Timer(s): 8. Improved Familiar I, which when activated, triggers Summon Improved Familiar I, the physical manifestation of your familiar, increases the damage dealt by your critical direct damage spells by 3%, the casting levels of your spells by 9, your cold, disease, fire, magic, and poison resistances by 25 points, your mana regeneration by 6 points, your maximum mana by 200 points, and allows you to see invisible creatures. Requirements: level 45.

aas.name: Mana Burn
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 565 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 7. Mana Burn I, when activated, consumes up to 3000 mana to deal 4x of the consumed mana as direct damage and prevents additional Mana Burn spells from landing on that target for 0:01:00. Requirements: level 45, Mental Clarity at level 3.

aas.name: Quick Evacuation
aas.description: This passive ability reduces the cast time of your evacuation and succor spells and abilities by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

aas.name: Strong Root
aas.description: Ability Activation ID: 117 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 2. This ability, when activated, roots your target in place for up to 48 seconds with a 300 point resist modifier and a 2 second cast time. Requirements: level 35.

aas.name: Unbound Destruction
aas.description: This passive ability increases your chance to land a critical hit with your direct damage spells by 2/4/6%. Requirements: level 12. }
